name: SuperPawn
description_short: SuperPawn at 5846 Camelback Rd, Glendale, AZ 85301 is Mon-Fri 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM. Google reviewers rate the branch 3.0 stars across 66 reviews. Call +1 623-934-9555.
description_long:
FirstCash, Inc. is headquartered in Fort Worth, Texas and operates as the leading international pawn store operator with more than 3,300 retail locations across 29 U.S. states, the District of Columbia, the United Kingdom, and Latin America (including all Mexican states plus Guatemala, Colombia, and El Salvador). The company employs approximately 22,000 people and is listed in both the S&P MidCap 400 Index and Russell 2000 Index, indicating substantial scale and institutional credibility.

FirstCash primarily serves cash and credit-constrained consumers through its core pawn lending business. Customers can obtain small non-recourse pawn loans secured by pledged personal property such as jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments. The company also buys and sells used merchandise across these categories. Additionally, FirstCash offers layaway services (10% down payment plans) and specialty services including gold/precious metal buying and retail sales through its extensive store network.

FirstCash distinguishes itself through its massive geographic footprint and international presence, making it accessible to consumers across North America and Latin America. The company also operates AFF, a wholly-owned subsidiary providing lease-to-own and retail finance payment solutions through over 15,000 active retail merchant partner locations, demonstrating diversification beyond traditional pawn operations.

For consumers, FirstCash pawn loans provide immediate cash without credit checks, but come with the risk of losing pledged items if loans aren't repaid. Interest rates and terms vary by location and state regulation. The layaway service offers an alternative to credit but requires upfront payment. This model works best for those with valuable personal property and immediate cash needs, though borrowing costs and asset forfeiture risk should be carefully evaluated against alternatives.
pros: 3,300+ locations across 29 U.S. states plus international presence ensures accessibility and convenience
No credit check required for pawn loans, making them accessible to credit-constrained consumers
Non-recourse loans mean you're not liable for deficiency if pledged items are sold
Fast cash availability on-the-spot with no lengthy application process
Layaway service option available with affordable 10% down payment alternative to credit
Buys wide variety of items including gold, jewelry, electronics, tools, and musical instruments for immediate cash
Large, publicly-traded company (S&P 400/Russell 2000) with institutional oversight and financial stability
cons: Risk of losing valuable personal property if pawn loan isn't repaid by due date
Interest rates and fees vary significantly by location and state regulation, with no transparent published rates
Limited to consumers who own valuable items to pledge; not suitable for those without collateral
Layaway service requires 10% upfront payment and extended payments, still a form of financing
Non-recourse structure means no credit-building benefit—loan activity doesn't report to credit bureaus
best_for: Consumers with valuable personal property (jewelry, electronics, instruments) who need immediate cash and have no access to traditional credit
Credit-constrained individuals who cannot qualify for personal loans or credit cards
People facing temporary cash shortages who can reliably repay within the pawn loan term
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for cash-constrained consumers with valuable personal property who need immediate funding without credit checks. The primary caveat is the risk of asset loss if the loan isn't repaid and the lack of credit-building benefit—pawn loans typically don't report to credit bureaus, so they won't help improve credit scores.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal property (non-recourse)
Gold and precious metal buying (cash on-the-spot)
Retail merchandise sales (jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, instruments)
Item hunting/inventory browsing across store network
Store locator and online inventory search
Lease-to-own and retail finance solutions through AFF subsidiary
Merchant payment solutions through AFF network (15,000+ partners)
